name: Shrimp and Pork w/ Cellophane Noodles
recipeIngredient: soak in hot water for 20 minutes
drain - save 1 cup of soak liquid
soak in hot water for 10 minutes
then in cold water for 30 minutes
recipeInstructions:
1. To the boiling water, add the soaked cellophane noodles. Bring the water to a boil again. Drain and rinse the noodles, then cut them into short lengths.
2. Heat the wok: Add oil and let it heat.
Cooking:
3. Add onion; stir-fry until translucent.
4. Add pork; stir-fry until it loses its pinkness (about 2-3 minutes).
5. Add shrimp; stir until they turn pinkish.
6. Add sherry; stir quickly until the liquid evaporates.
7. Sprinkle with dark soy sauce and pepper.
8. Add mushrooms; stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
9. Add the saved mushroom soak liquid; stir gently into the dish.
10. Add noodles; stir gently to combine.
11. Serve!
